text:
### North West (2 branches)  
**Manchester Central**
- **Address:** Deansgate House, Manchester, M3 2BA
- **Branch Manager:** Emma Thompson
- **Staff:** 1
- **Facilities:** Customer service counter, account opening desk
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 09:00–17:00, Saturday 09:00–13:00
- **Estimated Customers:** 68
- **Services:** Account opening, customer service, cash handling  
**Liverpool Pier**
- **Address:** Pier Head, Liverpool, L3 1TY
- **Branch Manager:** Catherine Brown
- **Staff:** 1
- **Facilities:** Customer service, account opening
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 09:00–17:00, Saturday 09:00–13:00
- **Estimated Customers:** 38
- **Services:** Account opening, customer service  
---
name: Chunk 5/34

raw_entities.name: North West Region
raw_entities.description: A regional branch network overseeing two physical retail locations in Manchester and Liverpool. It is responsible for local operational management, staff allocation, and customer service delivery across the designated geographic area.

raw_entities.name: Manchester Central Branch
raw_entities.description: A physical retail branch located at Deansgate House in Manchester. The facility provides dedicated customer service and account opening desks, operating under a single branch manager with one allocated staff member.
context: - **Facilities:** Customer service counter, account opening desk

raw_entities.name: Liverpool Pier Branch
raw_entities.description: A physical retail branch situated at Pier Head in Liverpool. The location offers customer service and account opening facilities, managed by a dedicated branch manager with a single staff allocation.

raw_entities.name: Emma Thompson
raw_entities.description: Branch Manager responsible for overseeing daily operations and staff supervision at the Manchester Central location. She holds defined accountability for ensuring service delivery standards are met within the branch.

raw_entities.name: Catherine Brown
raw_entities.description: Branch Manager responsible for overseeing daily operations and staff supervision at the Liverpool Pier location. She holds defined accountability for ensuring service delivery standards are met within the branch.

raw_entities.name: Manchester Central Branch Staffing Level
raw_entities.description: Operational staffing metric indicating a single employee is allocated to support branch operations at the Manchester Central location. This headcount figure defines the maximum personnel capacity available for customer-facing and administrative tasks.

raw_entities.name: Manchester Central Branch Customer Base Estimate
raw_entities.description: Quantitative estimate of the active customer base served by the Manchester Central branch. This capacity metric reflects the projected volume of retail accounts managed within the branch's catchment area.

raw_entities.name: Liverpool Pier Branch Customer Base Estimate
raw_entities.description: Quantitative estimate of the active customer base served by the Liverpool Pier branch. This capacity metric reflects the projected volume of retail accounts managed within the branch's catchment area.

raw_entities.name: Account Opening Service
raw_entities.description: A core retail banking service enabling new customers to establish deposit accounts through dedicated branch facilities. The process is supported by specialized desks and counters to streamline onboarding procedures.
context: - **Facilities:** Customer service counter, account opening desk
- **Services:** Account opening, customer service, cash handling

raw_entities.name: Customer Service Delivery
raw_entities.description: A frontline operational function providing direct assistance to retail customers across physical branch locations. The service is delivered through dedicated counters and desks staffed by trained personnel.
context: - **Facilities:** Customer service counter, account opening desk

raw_entities.name: Cash Handling Service
raw_entities.description: A physical banking service facilitating the receipt, storage, and disbursement of physical currency at branch locations. The operation requires secure facilities and strict adherence to cash management protocols.
context: - **Services:** Account opening, customer service, cash handling

raw_entities.name: Branch Operating Hours Schedule
raw_entities.description: Standardized operational schedule dictating branch availability for customer access and service delivery. The constraint enforces Monday through Friday operations from 09:00 to 17:00, with Saturday hours limited to 09:00–13:00.
